positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_conclusion
% SZS output start Proof for pos_conclusion
1. mountain_range(picuris) & (located_in(picuris,new_mexico) | located_in(picuris,texas)) [input(axiom)]
2. mine(harding) & located_in(harding,picuris) [input(axiom)]
3. donated(harding) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1] : ((mine(X0) & donated(X0) & mountain_range(X1) & located_in(X0,X1)) => ~located_in(X1,texas)) [input(axiom)]
5. located_in(picuris,new_mexico) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~located_in(picuris,new_mexico) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~located_in(picuris,new_mexico) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (~located_in(X1,texas) | (~mine(X0) | ~donated(X0) | ~mountain_range(X1) | ~located_in(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 4]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (~located_in(X1,texas) | ~mine(X0) | ~donated(X0) | ~mountain_range(X1) | ~located_in(X0,X1)) [flattening 8]
10. located_in(picuris,new_mexico) | located_in(picuris,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
11. mountain_range(picuris) [cnf transformation 1]
12. located_in(harding,picuris) [cnf transformation 2]
13. mine(harding) [cnf transformation 2]
14. donated(harding) [cnf transformation 3]
15. ~located_in(X1,texas) | ~mine(X0) | ~donated(X0) | ~mountain_range(X1) | ~located_in(X0,X1) [cnf transformation 9]
16. ~located_in(picuris,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 7]
17. located_in(picuris,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 10,16]
18. ~mine(X0) | ~donated(X0) | ~mountain_range(picuris) | ~located_in(X0,picuris) [resolution 15,17]
19. ~located_in(X0,picuris) | ~donated(X0) | ~mine(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 18,11]
20. ~donated(harding) | ~mine(harding) [resolution 19,12]
21. ~mine(harding) [forward subsumption resolution 20,14]
22. $false [forward subsumption resolution 21,13]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_conclusion
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:

cnf(u12,axiom,

cnf(u14,axiom,

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(picuris,new_mexico)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    mountain_range(picuris)).
